update: The Identity Platform integration with reCAPTCHA Enterprise API now supports  bot protection  and  SMS toll fraud protection  for SMS-based flows on iOS platforms.

Support for SMS-based authentication flows in the Identity Platform integration with reCAPTCHA Enterprise API is now in Preview. In addition, the integration now supports reCAPTCHA's SMS toll fraud protection and the ability to bring your own reCAPTCHA keys. 
 For more information, see the following pages: 
 
 Integrate Identity Platform with the reCAPTCHA Enterprise API 
 Enable SMS toll fraud protection for SMS-based authentication 
 Bring your own reCAPTCHA keys

Custom organization policies for Identity Platform are generally available (GA). You can use custom organization policies to allow or deny specific operations on Identity Platform resources for the security, compliance, or governance requirements of your application. 
 For more information, see  Use custom organization policies .
Automatic, anonymous account deletion  is now enforced for all projects that have  autodelete_anonymous_users  enabled.
Time-based one-time password (TOTP)  as an additional multi-factor authentication option is generally available (GA).

Email enumeration protection  is enabled by default for all new projects. With email enumeration protection enabled, the Firebase Auth SDK method  fetchSignInMethodsForEmail  returns null, for added security.
Password policies  are generally available ( GA ).
Firebase App Check  is available in Preview.
Time-based one-time password (TOTP)  as an additional multi-factor authentication option is available in Preview.
Added SDK support to meet Apple's  user deletion requirements .
Play Integrity is now supported for client-side authentication on Android applications. For more information, see  Authenticate with Firebase on Android using a Phone Number .
Identity Platform has updated several quotas. View the updated quotas from Identity  Toolkit API  >  Quotas  on the  APIs & Services page in the Google Cloud console .
Added the ability to set up SMS region policies to help protect your applications from potential SMS abuse. For more information, see  Using SMS regions to protect your app from SMS abuse .
Activity logging  can now be enabled on a per-tenant basis. The feature is generally available.
Identity Platform Web v9 modular SDK is now available at the  GA stage . For details, see  Upgrade to the modular Web SDK (v9)  .
Session cookies  are now supported for tenants. The feature is generally available.
Facebook Limited Login  is supported at the GA stage.
Identity Platform supports  Argon2 for password hashing algorithms , and  SMTP- and template-customized settings for tenant projects  at the GA stage.
Support for OIDC  sign in  and  management  for Identity Platform is released at the GA stage.

Blocking functions  are released at the GA stage. 
 Blocking functions let you execute custom code that modifies the result of a user registering or signing in to your app.
Sign in with Apple  is now supported.
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is now GA!
Multi-tenancy  for Identity Platform is now GA!
Identity Platform is now GA!
Welcome to the Identity Platform beta!
